title: Clearance for Seafarers Included in the List of Persons Disqualified to
content: 29 Participate in the Overseas Employment Program. Employment contracts of those 30 seafarers whose names were identified in the list of persons disqualified to participate in 31 the overseas employment program shall be subject for clearance and approval by the 32 Department upon the submission of documentary requirements as prescribed through the 33 issuance of appropriate guidelines. 34 35

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
